rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Yes, it has arrived and I read

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Mrs. Kamalamma, did you cook food ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Yes, I cooked it a already.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: What all did you prepare ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: I prepared rice, sauce, ragi balls and
gravy.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: What vegetable did you cook ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: I prepared okra curry.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: At what time did your husband come ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: He came at 12'o clock.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: At what time did you eat lunch ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: I just now had my lunch.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Did you wash the vessels today ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Yes, today the maid servant did not
turn up.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Did you do all the work yourself ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Yes, I swept, washed the vessels and
cooked food.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Did you yourself wash clothes also ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Yes.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: You know all the work.   You are a
clever woman.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Did you see your elder brother ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Yes, I saw him this morning.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Did you invite him for food ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Yes, he will come for food tonight.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Did you bring vegetables from the
market ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Yes, I brought vegetables and fruits.
